content.en:
With Ye Tian's strength, it is not difficult to find the Feather Heaven and Earth, the Feather Heaven and Earth must not be very far away from the Blood Mist Heaven and Earth, so as long as he walks around all the exotic worlds around, he will have hope of finding the Feather Heaven and Earth.

As a result, Ye Tian began to cross one foreign world after another.

Time passed slowly like this, and hundreds of millions of years passed unconsciously, and during this period, Ye Tian searched for a lot of exotic worlds, plus investigations, so it took a lot of time.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian descended to a foreign world.

There were almost no living beings in this exotic world, and it was extremely silent, but Ye Tian had obtained a Feathering Heaven and Earth Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal from within the Blood Mist Alliance through his understanding of the Feathering Heaven and Earth.

At this moment, Ye Tian comprehended the rules of this exotic world a little, and found that it was exactly the same as that Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal.

Obviously, this is the Feather World.

Soon, Ye Tian found a supreme strong man and caught the other party.

"Tell me, where is the Misty Ancestor?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The strongest man obviously recognized Ye Tian, and couldn't help but roar angrily: "Ten Thousand Law Ancestor, don't be arrogant, the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor is here, I have already informed the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor, he will definitely kill you!"

In his eyes, the Immortal Mist Ancestor was obviously an invincible existence, but he needed to guard this place and couldn't leave for the time being, which allowed Ye Tian to invade the Blood Mist Alliance.

But he didn't know Ye Tian's terror and the jealousy of the Immortal Fog Ancestor at all, otherwise how would he dare to speak like this!

......

Feathering the world somewhere.

The Immortal Fog Ancestor received the summons from his subordinates, and his expression suddenly changed.

In fact, he vaguely felt that an invincible person had descended on the Feather Heaven and Earth, but he didn't dare to probe for fear of attracting the attention of that invincible person.

He also expected that the invincible man was just passing by, but after receiving this summons, he knew who it was.

Ye Tian, the ancestor of ten thousand laws!

"Damn, he actually found it!" said the Stygian Misty Ancestor nervously.

He really didn't want to fight with Ye Tian, although Ye Tian killed the three invincibles of the Blood Mist Alliance, he didn't have much anger, compared to the chance of the Blood Mist Alliance, the fall of the three invincibles was nothing.

Once he obtained this opportunity, his strength was raised to a fourth-class invincible or even a third-class invincible, and it would naturally be easy to kill Ye Tian.

But now, he doesn't want any surprises.

However, now he is afraid that he will not be able to hide.

The Invincible's divine sense is far from being able to explore the entire Exotic World, but there are many ways to detect the powerhouses in the Exotic World, and unless he has too powerful secret techniques to hide himself, he can't hide.

At this moment, Ye Tian took out a compass-type treasure, which was a special treasure purchased from Tianfeng Hai, which could detect any living creature hidden in an exotic world, even if it was invincible, it was difficult to avoid the detection of this compass.

Airplanes!!!!

The compass unleashed a wave that enveloped the entire Exotic Realm at an extremely fast speed.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian's gaze locked on the location of an invincible person through the compass, and then he pierced through time and space with a thought, looking at the infinite distance.

Bang!!!!

One step across time and space, he arrived at the place where the Immortal Mist Ancestor was.

This is a golden mountain, and there is a palace on the mountain, and the Ancestor of the Mist is in this palace.

"Hey, this mountain of gold ......"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

When he spied through time and space in a distant place just now, he didn't find this golden mountain, but now this golden mountain has appeared.

Immediately, he used his divine sense to spy on this golden mountain, but found that there was no place in front of him, where was there any golden mountain!

"No, it's the divine sense and all the snooping techniques that can't observe this golden mountain, only by looking at it up close can you see this golden mountain!" Ye Tian was shocked.

Once upon a time, when he was still relatively weak, he also encountered similar treasures, but it was when he was very weak.

And now, he has reached the realm of a fifth-class invincible, and he can't even spy on this golden mountain, which shows how precious this golden mountain is, or it has something to do with amazing treasures, so it will have this effect.

At this moment, he completely understood.

Why didn't the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor show up, why did the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor destroy those gates and prevent the Feather Heaven and Earth from being exposed, all for the sake of the opportunity here.

The chances here are enough to make the invincible crazy and want to hide at all costs.

"It's a good opportunity, but now it's mine!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Rumble!!!!

The Dark Fog Ancestor walked out of the palace and looked at Ye Tian with a complicated gaze.

"Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor, I was surprised, I thought you were just an invincible person who had just been promoted, but I didn't expect you to be a fifth-rank invincible!"

"Misty Ancestor, what is this golden mountain?"

Ye Tian pointed to Jin Shan and asked.

"It's just a small place of chance!" "The Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, you have actually become a fifth-class invincible, you should have been to the eternal world of the Tianlin Realm, I am a member of the Netherworld Corridor, a super-name-level force in the Tianlin Realm, and the Netherworld Corridor has many second-class invincibles and third-class invincibles, and among the countless super-name-level forces in the Tianlin Realm, they are enough to rank in the top hundred, can you think clearly, are you willing to offend such a behemoth for a small chance?"

The Immortal Fog Ancestor didn't want to make a move with Ye Tian, so he moved out of the Netherworld Corridor to deter Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian sneered and said, "Netherworld Corridor? is it very powerful, I am a senior member of the Heavenly Wind Sea!"

"Holy Name-level Heavenly Wind Sea, don't fool me!" "The Immortal Fog Ancestor didn't believe Ye Tian's words at all.

At this time, Ye Tian took out the badge belonging to Tianfenghai and said: "This is my Tianfenghai badge, if you still don't believe it, it doesn't matter, in short, you will die today!"

The Immortal Fog Ancestor believed it a little, but he wouldn't admit it.

Besides, he couldn't give up this opportunity.

"The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws should have just been promoted to the Fifth Rank Invincible, and now that the Feather Heaven and Earth is not a great tribulation, the Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor has been suppressed by the Feather Heaven and Earth, and his strength has been greatly damaged, I still have hope of winning!"

Immediately, he did it!

And Ye Tian also did the same.

As soon as he made a move, Ye Tian performed the top invincible ancestral skill, the Tianji Battle Skill.

Kill!!!!!

Bang!!!!

The void shook, and the two fifth-rank invincibles immediately fought together.

As soon as they fought, Ye Tian found that the Immortal Sect Ancestor's invincible body was too fragile, far inferior to his invincible body.

Obviously, the Immortal Fog Ancestor had not cultivated the Invincible Body Robbery Method, which was why he was so vulnerable.

Even if Ye Tian was suppressed by the rules of Feathering Heaven and Earth, and his strength could only be exerted in a small part, he still easily crushed the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor.

After a few moves, the Immortal Fog Ancestor was defeated by Ye Tian and was invincible.
